meaning: n.<澳>废石,破烂的东西,废物
examples: The loose body consists of ore layer and mullock layer, and the size of the particles in loose body could be divided into 1 ~ 10 fractions, presented with average value.
Richard Westwood Brookes, from Mullock's, said the fakes, which are perfect, were highly sought after by collectors.
The auction will be held by Mullock's, which specialises in sporting collectables.
The auction, held by Mullock's in Ludlow, is on 14 February.
